title: The Marine Products Export Development Authority Act, 1972
full_text: The Marine Products Export Development Authority Act, 1972 सामुद्रिक उत्‍पाद निर्यात विकासप्राधिकरण अधिनियम, 1972 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1972-13 Act Number: 13 Enactment Date: 1972-04-20 Act Year: 1972 Short Title: The Marine Products Export Development Authority Act, 1972 Hindi Title: सामुद्रिक उत्‍पाद निर्यात विकासप्राधिकरण अधिनियम, 1972 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of an Authority for the development of the marine products industry under the control of the Union and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Commerce and Industry Department: Department of Commerce Enforcement Date: 12-07-1972 Notification: 12th July, 1972, vide notification No. G.S.R. 388(E), dated 12th July, 1972, in respect of the provisions of sections other than sections 11 to 19 (both inclusive), see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). 15th January, 1973, vide notification No. G.S.R. 8(E), dated 10th January, 1973, in respect of the provisions of sections 11 to 19 (both inclusive), see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Declaration as to expediency of control by the Union. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Establishment and constitution of the Authority. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Acts or proceedings of Authority or its Committees not to be invalidated. Section 6. Salary and allowances of Chairman. Section 7. Executive officers of the Authority and other staff. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Committees of the Authority. Section 9. Functions of the Authority. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Dissolution of the Authority. Section 11. Registration of fishing vessel, processing plant, etc. Section 12. Application, cancellation, fee payable and other matters relating to registration. Section 13. Returns to be made by owners. Section 14. [Repealed.]. Section 15. [Repealed.]. Section 16. Grants and loans by the Central Government. Section 17. Constitution of the Fund. Show Related Subordinates Section 18. Borrowing powers of the Authority. Section 19. Accounts and audit. Section 20. Power to prohibit or control imports and exports of marine products. Section 21. Directions by Central Government. Section 22. Returns and reports. Section 23. Penalty for making false returns. Section 24. Penalties for obstructing a member or officer of the Authority in the discharge of his duties and for failure to produce books and records. Section 25. Other penalties. Section 25A. Adjudication of penalties. Section 26. Offences by companies. Section 27. Jurisdiction of court. Section 28. Previous sanction of Central Government. Section 29. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 30. Power to delegate. Section 31. Suspension of operation of Act. Section 32. Application of other laws not barred. Section 33. Power of Central Government to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 34. Power to make regulations.
